title: malva aspera
intro: Malva aspera, also known as the rough mallow or tree mallow, is a perennial plant species in the mallow family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues and reducing inflammation, which may help alleviate conditions like irritable bowel syndrome and arthritis. Malva aspera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies and folk medicine.
